project_type: TypeScript monorepo with pnpm workspaces, Turborepo, Fastify 5 backends, Next.js 15 frontends
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + Turborepo 2. Build order: packages first (common, auth, database, server-core, etc), then apps. turbo.json has typecheck and test depending on ^build.
test_framework: Vitest 2 with vi.fn() mocks. Tests in backend/__tests__/*.test.ts or src/__tests__/*.test.ts
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install, 2. pnpm turbo typecheck, 3. pnpm turbo test, 4. pnpm turbo build, 5. pnpm turbo lint
snapshot_or_generated_files: Prisma client generated via prisma generate. packages/database has 'build' script that runs prisma generate then tsc.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full npm access. Node 22 available via nvm. No Docker daemon needed for validation.
contribution_requirements: Uses commitlint with conventional commits. Husky pre-commit hooks with lint-staged.
key_patterns: All backends use @quant/server-core createApp() which registers auth, helmet, cors, rate-limit, health. Routes access prisma via (fastify as any).prisma and auth via (request as any).auth.userId. Each app has backend/app.ts with getConfig() and buildApp(). Frontend Next.js apps have src/app/api/ route handlers that proxy to backends.
directory_structure: Root: package.json, turbo.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml. apps/ has 16 apps (quantmail, quantchat, quantai, quantads, etc.). packages/ has 85+ packages (server-core, database, auth, common, ai, shared-ui, etc.). Each app has backend/ with app.ts, routes/, services/, __tests__/ and frontend src/ with Next.js app router.
